Our Promise

Made at Dawn,
Delivered Fresh.

Every bottle of TENDERBAR coconut milk is prepared between 5 and 6 AM from carefully selected tender coconuts. No refrigerated stock. No yesterday's batch. What you receive is what was made that morning — nothing more.

We believe real freshness has no shortcuts. That's why we've kept our process simple, honest, and untouched by preservatives since day one.

Why Tenderbar

Every sip tells
the difference.

01
Prepared Fresh Every Morning
We don't store. We don't batch. Fresh coconuts are processed each morning so your milk is always at peak taste and nutrition — never hours-old.
02
Zero Preservatives, Zero Compromise
No stabilisers, no additives, no artificial anything. Pure coconut milk — exactly as nature intended it.
03
Sourced from Premium Tender Coconuts
We hand-pick tender green coconuts at the peak of their sweetness. The result is a naturally rich, subtly sweet milk no factory can replicate.
